title: staff — kill switches
description: Operational kill switches distinct from the tier-based entitlements. These are for emergency-off / staged rollout / per-tenant ops interventions. Every flag is ON in normal production; off flips are ops decisions.

flags.description: Master toggle for staff hire routes. Off = POST /staff returns 503 with a maintenance banner. Emergency-only (used during DB migrations of the staff table or staff_slot entitlement).
Off = PATCH /staff/{staff}/compensation returns 503. Emergency-only if the compensation-audit queue is unstable + we need to freeze writes to preserve audit integrity.
Off = GET /staff/{staff}/compensation returns 503. Rarely used — reads don't create data integrity risk — but exists for compliance-freeze scenarios (regulator investigation with a hold order).
Off = the /offboard cascade=true flag is refused. Admin must archive coach + remove team memberships manually. Test/staging only.
Off = pending certifications remain in pending state; the verify endpoint refuses. Used when the coach_certifications_verified compliance workflow is under scrutiny.
Off = ReconcileBranchManagerInvariantJob skips. Emergency-only if the reconciler is misbehaving.
Off = CheckProbationEndingSoonJob no-ops. Used when notifications module is unstable to avoid backing up its queue.
Off = ExpireCoachCertificationsJob still transitions expired state (data integrity) but the 30/14/7-day pre-expiry reminders don't fire.
Off = PurgeOffboardedStaffJob no-ops. Only flip off for maintenance windows or regulator-hold scenarios where retention pause is legally mandated.
